song.title: Hallelujah Christ is Victor
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Hallelujah! Christ is Victor, Tell with every breath, That the Savior still is conqu’ror Over sin and death.|| Hallelujah! Christ is Victor, Tell where’er you go, That the Lord is still the conqu’ror, Over every foe.
[V2] 2) Hallelujah! Christ is Victor, Pain and sickness flee, When we plead the mighty vict’ry Won on Calvary.
[V3] 3) Hallelujah! Christ is Victor, Therefore do and dare; Go wherever Jesus sends you In prevailing prayer.
[V4] 4) Hallelujah! Christ is Victor, No defeat nor fear Evermore must dim thy vision! Christ the way will clear.
[V5] 5) Hallelujah! Christ is Victor Soon His voice shall ring, “Come ye conqu’rors, come up hither, Join thy conqu’ring King.”
song.author: Margaret E. Barber
